history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed because the springdoc-openapi dependency is missing or incompatible after the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade recipe modified the project's dependency management.
history.qwen_rationale: Insert a POM_PATCH step before the SB 2.7 upgrade to explicitly add springdoc-openapi-ui 1.7.0 (the latest version compatible with SB 2.7) to the compile classpath, ensuring GroupedOpenApi and related classes are available during the subsequent recipe and build steps.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed at upgrade_sb_to_2_7 because springdoc-openapi-ui 1.7.0 is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.7.x, causing missing org.springdoc.core.models package.
history.qwen_rationale: SpringDoc 1.7.0 only supports Spring Boot 2.6.x. Upgrading the dependency to 1.8.0 in the initial POM_PATCH step ensures compatibility with the SB 2.7 upgrade, allowing the subsequent SB 3.3 migration and Java 21 build to proceed without classpath errors.

history.qwen_observation: The manually added springdoc-openapi-ui 1.8.0 dependency is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.7, causing compilation failure during the SB 2.7 upgrade step.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the unnecessary manual SpringDoc dependency patch and using the UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe directly from JDK 17 will handle the Spring Boot 2.6 -> 3.3 transition, including the javax-to-jakarta migration and automatic SpringDoc version bump to 2.x, avoiding intermediate compatibility issues. The chain then proceeds to upgrade plugins and build configuration for Java 21.
